name: Garden Paprikash
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Seeded, diced green bell pepper
1 cup Seeded, diced red bell pepper
2 teaspoons Mincé fresh dill for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy, nonreactive saucepan, heat the oil over medium high heat.
2. Add the onions, carrots, potatoes and cabbage. Saute 2 minutes.
3. Add the peppers, tomato paste, paprika, garlic, caraway seeds and cayenne pepper. Saute 2 minutes, stirring well, until tomato paste begins to turn light brown.
4. Add the tomato juice and milk; stir to combine well.
5. Simmer about 30 minutes or until vegetables are tender and sauce is thickened.
6. Stir in yogurt and garnish with dill.
7. Serve over cooked noodles or rice.
